sections.instruction: my / your / his / her / its / our / their
sections.instruction_ru: my / your / his / her / its / our / their

cells: To show who owns or has something
cells_uz: Biror narsaning kimga tegishli ekanligini bildirish uchun

tip.label: Helpful hints
tip.translation:
Egalik determinatorlari har doim ot bilan birga keladi.
✓ _Is this **my** coffee?_
tip.translation_ru:
Притяжательные определители всегда используются перед существительным.
✓ _Is this **my** coffee?_

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
**Its** va **it's** bir xil ma'noni anglatmaydi.
✓ _Here's the dog's water and here's **its** food._ ( = the dog's food)
✓ _**It's** the best camera I've ever had._ ( = It is …)
tip.translation_ru:
**Its** и **it's** не означают одно и то же.
✓ _Here's the dog's water and here's **its** food._ ( = корм собаки)
✓ _**It's** the best camera I've ever had._ ( = It is …)

sections.instruction: mine / yours / his / hers / ours / theirs
sections.instruction_ru: mine / yours / his / hers / ours / theirs

cells: To show who owns or has something
cells_uz: Biror narsaning kimga tegishli ekanligini bildirish uchun

tip.label: Helpful hints
tip.translation:
Egalik olmoshlari ot bilan birga kelmaydi.
✗ _This is hers car._
tip.translation_ru:
Притяжательные местоимения не используются перед существительным.
✗ _This is hers car._

sections.instruction: myself / yourself / himself / herself / itself / ourselves / yourselves / themselves
sections.instruction_ru: myself / yourself / himself / herself / itself / ourselves / yourselves / themselves

cells: To describe actions where the subject and object are the same
_My computer turns **itself** off after half an hour._
cells_uz: Ega va to'ldiruvchi bir xil shaxs bo'lgan harakatlarni ifodalash uchun
_My computer turns **itself** off after half an hour._
cells_ru: Для описания действий, где подлежащее и дополнение — одно и то же лицо
_My computer turns **itself** off after half an hour._

cells_uz: Kimdir biror narsani o'zi qilganini ta'kidlash uchun
cells_ru: Для подчёркивания того, кто что-то делает
